A '''man''' was an the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Zadawi]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was an [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] who was forced to live in a slum in [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] by the purebreds, along with [[Zadawi's grandmother|his mother]] and his daughter. He worried over his mother and did not like Zadawi antagonizing her.

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] {{1st}}

|pl=Ojciec Zadawi
